faqs.question: What are the best family holiday parks on Great Ocean Road?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces, BIG4 Anglesea, and BIG4 Wye River Holiday Parks offer excellent family facilities along Great Ocean Road. Each provides powered sites, cabins, and pools. Anglesea Family Caravan Park is another solid option. These parks combine beach access with on-site amenities, making them ideal bases for exploring the region's attractions like the Twelve Apostles and local beaches.

faqs.question: Which caravan park on Great Ocean Road is best for kids?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park stands out for families with its dedicated kids' facilities, playground, and heated pool. The park's beachfront location means children can safely explore rock pools and sandy shores. BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces also excels with family-friendly activities and proximity to both beach and town attractions.

faqs.question: Which Great Ocean Road holiday parks have pools?
faqs.answer: All major parks—BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces, BIG4 Anglesea, and BIG4 Wye River—feature heated pools ideal for year-round swimming. Many heated pools operate during cooler months, making them essential facilities for rainy days or when ocean swims aren't appealing. Check seasonal hours when booking.

faqs.question: What holiday parks are closest to the beach on Great Ocean Road?
faqs.answer: BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park offers direct beachfront access, perfect for families wanting beach time before breakfast. BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces sits near Apollo Bay's patrolled beach, excellent for swimming. BIG4 Wye River Holiday Park provides beach proximity in a quieter location. All three eliminate the need for car travel to reach quality swimming spots.

faqs.question: Where can I find powered caravan sites on Great Ocean Road?
faqs.answer: All four parks—BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces, BIG4 Anglesea, BIG4 Wye River, and Anglesea Family Caravan Park—offer powered sites suitable for caravans and motorhomes. BIG4 parks typically have premium powered options with full hookups. Book early during school holidays as powered sites fill quickly along Great Ocean Road.

faqs.question: What cabin options exist for families at Great Ocean Road parks?
faqs.answer: BIG4 parks offer various cabin styles from budget-friendly options to luxury family units with ensuite bathrooms. Most sleep 4-6 people and include kitchenettes. Anglesea Family Caravan Park also provides cabin accommodation. Cabins are ideal for families wanting comfort without caravan setup, particularly during winter or rainy periods.

faqs.question: Are there pet-friendly holiday parks on Great Ocean Road?
faqs.answer: Most parks welcome pets, though policies vary. BIG4 Apollo Bay Pisces and BIG4 Anglesea typically allow dogs in designated areas. Always confirm pet fees and restrictions before booking. Great Ocean Road's beaches have dog-friendly zones and walking trails, making pet-friendly parks practical for families with animals.

faqs.question: Which Great Ocean Road holiday park offers best value for families?
faqs.answer: Anglesea Family Caravan Park typically provides competitive pricing for families without sacrificing quality facilities. During shoulder seasons (April-May, September), all parks offer better rates than school holidays. BIG4 parks offer discounted family packages and memberships, worth investigating if planning multiple Great Ocean Road trips.

faqs.question: What's the best area on Great Ocean Road to stay with kids?
faqs.answer: Anglesea balances beach access, family facilities, and proximity to attractions like Split Point Lighthouse and local pools. Apollo Bay works well for families wanting more town amenities and adventure activities. Wye River suits families seeking quieter surroundings. Consider your priorities: activity level, beach access, or peaceful relaxation when choosing.

faqs.question: What can kids do on rainy days at Great Ocean Road parks?
faqs.answer: Heated pools at all major parks become rainy-day hubs. Many parks offer indoor entertainment spaces. Nearby, families visit the Surf World Museum, local libraries, or shopping centers. Apollo Bay's town offers cafes and indoor attractions. Wye River's nature provides sheltered walks. Pack indoor entertainment; rainy days occur frequently during cooler months.
